description_en: Join neighbors from across Ward 1 for a community meet & greet with DC Council candidate Jackie Reyes-Yanes. Your voice is key to building the future of Ward 1.
title_en: Let’s Talk, Ward 1 - Meet & Greet with Jackie Reyes-Yanes
description_es: Únete a vecinos de todo el Ward 1 en un encuentro comunitario con la candidata al Concejo de DC, Jackie Reyes-Yanes. Tu voz es clave para construir el futuro del Ward 1.
address_en: Maggy Beauty Salon 2407 18th St NW BSMT, Washington, DC 20009
title_es: Hablemos, Ward 1 – Encuentro comunitario con Jackie Reyes-Yanes
title: Let’s Talk, Ward 1 – Meet & Greet
